# WEB.md
1. **Performance / payload** — what ships per page; dead/oversized JS, CSS,
   images, fonts; lazy-loading; caching; the biggest assets.
2. **Accessibility** — semantics, ARIA, keyboard, focus, contrast,
   reduced-motion, no-JS baseline.
3. **i18n / copy / SEO** — translation completeness and parity; copy at a
   native-reader bar; metadata, canonical/hreflang, structured data,
   sitemap/robots.
